```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 1. input / output
# ----------------------------
input_file <- "input_files/wound_closure_mitomycin.csv"
output_dir <- "output/wound_closure/mitomycin"

dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 2. read and format data
# ----------------------------

df <- read.csv(input_file)

# exclude problematic well
df <- df %>%
  filter(Well != "D5")

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Well = as.character(Well),
    Recombinant = factor(Recombinant, levels = c("CTRL", "WT", "MUTANT")),
    Mitomycin = factor(Mitomycin, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("0", "1")),
    Cell_front_velocity = as.numeric(Cell_front_velocity)
  )

# optional: make sure CTRL_PERCENT is numeric if present
if ("CTRL_PERCENT" %in% colnames(df)) {
  df$CTRL_PERCENT <- as.numeric(df$CTRL_PERCENT)
}

# quick check
stopifnot(all(levels(df$Recombinant) == c("CTRL", "WT", "MUTANT")))
stopifnot(all(levels(df$Mitomycin) == c("0", "1")))

write.csv(df, file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_input_checked.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 3. main model: two-way ANOVA / linear model
# ----------------------------
model <- lm(Cell_front_velocity ~ Recombinant * Mitomycin, data = df)

model_summary <- summary(model)
model_anova <- anova(model)

capture.output(model_summary,
               file = file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_model_summary.txt"))

capture.output(model_anova,
               file = file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_model_anova.txt"))

# ----------------------------
# 4. estimated marginal means
# ----------------------------
emm_full <- emmeans(model, ~ Recombinant * Mitomycin)

emm_recomb_by_mito <- emmeans(model, ~ Recombinant | Mitomycin)
emm_mito_by_recomb <- emmeans(model, ~ Mitomycin | Recombinant)

write.csv(as.data.frame(emm_full),
          file.path(output_dir, "emmeans_recombinant_by_mitomycin.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 5. comparisons of recombinant groups within each Mitomycin condition
#    - WT vs CTRL
#    - MUTANT vs CTRL
# ----------------------------
recomb_vs_ctrl <- as.data.frame(
  contrast(
    emm_recomb_by_mito,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = which(levels(df$Recombinant) == "CTRL"),
    adjust = "BH"
  )
)

write.csv(recomb_vs_ctrl,
          file.path(output_dir, "recombinant_vs_ctrl_within_mitomycin_BH.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# ----------------------------
# 6. WT vs MUTANT within each Mitomycin condition
# ----------------------------
wt_vs_mut <- as.data.frame(
  contrast(
    emm_recomb_by_mito,
    method = list("WT - MUTANT" = c(0, 1, -1)),
    adjust = "BH"
  )
)

write.csv(wt_vs_mut,
          file.path(output_dir, "WT_vs_MUTANT_within_mitomycin_BH.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# ----------------------------
# 7. Mitomycin effect within each recombinant group
#    - 1 vs 0 for CTRL
#    - 1 vs 0 for WT
#    - 1 vs 0 for MUTANT
# ----------------------------
mito_within_group <- as.data.frame(
  contrast(
    emm_mito_by_recomb,
    method = "revpairwise",   # gives 1 - 0 with current factor order
    adjust = "BH"
  )
)

write.csv(mito_within_group,
          file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_within_each_recombinant_BH.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# ----------------------------
# 8. optional: all pairwise recombinant comparisons within each Mitomycin
#    includes CTRL vs WT, CTRL vs MUTANT, WT vs MUTANT
# ----------------------------
all_recomb_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  pairs(emm_recomb_by_mito, adjust = "BH")
)

write.csv(all_recomb_pairs,
          file.path(output_dir, "all_recombinant_pairwise_within_mitomycin_BH.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# ----------------------------
# 9. optional: simple effects of Mitomycin between recombinant groups
#    asks whether the Mitomycin response differs from CTRL
# ----------------------------
mito_response_diff_vs_ctrl <- as.data.frame(
  contrast(
    emm_mito_by_recomb,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = which(levels(df$Recombinant) == "CTRL"),
    adjust = "BH"
  )
)

write.csv(mito_response_diff_vs_ctrl,
          file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_response_difference_vs_ctrl_BH.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 10. summary table
# ----------------------------
summary_table <- df %>%
  group_by(Recombinant, Mitomycin) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_velocity = mean(Cell_front_velocity, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_velocity = sd(Cell_front_velocity, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_ctrl_percent = if ("CTRL_PERCENT" %in% colnames(df)) mean(CTRL_PERCENT, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    sd_ctrl_percent = if ("CTRL_PERCENT" %in% colnames(df)) sd(CTRL_PERCENT, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(summary_table,
          file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_summary_table.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# ----------------------------
# 11. helper function for formatting p-values for figure annotation
# ----------------------------
format_p_for_plot <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return(NA_character_)
  if (p < 1e-4) return("p < 0.0001")
  paste0("p = ", formatC(signif(p, 3), format = "fg", flag = "#"))
}

# make annotation-ready tables
recomb_vs_ctrl_annot <- recomb_vs_ctrl %>%
  mutate(p_label = vapply(p.value, format_p_for_plot, character(1)))

wt_vs_mut_annot <- wt_vs_mut %>%
  mutate(p_label = vapply(p.value, format_p_for_plot, character(1)))

mito_within_group_annot <- mito_within_group %>%
  mutate(p_label = vapply(p.value, format_p_for_plot, character(1)))

write.csv(recomb_vs_ctrl_annot,
          file.path(output_dir, "recombinant_vs_ctrl_within_mitomycin_BH_for_plot.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(wt_vs_mut_annot,
          file.path(output_dir, "WT_vs_MUTANT_within_mitomycin_BH_for_plot.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(mito_within_group_annot,
          file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_within_each_recombinant_BH_for_plot.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

# ----------------------------
# 12. plots - raw values
# ----------------------------
p_raw <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Recombinant, y = Cell_front_velocity, fill = Mitomycin)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Mitomycin),
              position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.12, dodge.width = 0.8),
              alpha = 0.85, size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "Wound closure assay with Mitomycin",
    x = "Recombinant",
    y = "Cell front velocity"
  )

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_raw_boxplot.pdf"), p_raw, width = 6.5, height = 5)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_raw_boxplot.png"), p_raw, width = 6.5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# optional faceted version
p_raw_facet <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Mitomycin, y = Cell_front_velocity, fill = Mitomycin)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, alpha = 0.85, size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Recombinant, nrow = 1) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "Wound closure assay with Mitomycin",
    x = "Mitomycin",
    y = "Cell front velocity"
  )

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_raw_boxplot_faceted.pdf"), p_raw_facet, width = 8, height = 4)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_raw_boxplot_faceted.png"), p_raw_facet, width = 8, height = 4, dpi = 300)

# ----------------------------
# 13. optional normalized plot only
# ----------------------------
if ("CTRL_PERCENT" %in% colnames(df)) {
  p_norm <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Recombinant, y = CTRL_PERCENT, fill = Mitomycin)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = Mitomycin),
                position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.12, dodge.width = 0.8),
                alpha = 0.85, size = 2) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(
      title = "Wound closure assay with Mitomycin (normalized to control)",
      x = "Recombinant",
      y = "Percent of control"
    )

  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_norm_boxplot.pdf"), p_norm, width = 6.5, height = 5)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "mitomycin_norm_boxplot.png"), p_norm, width = 6.5, height = 5, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 14. short console output for quick inspection
# ----------------------------
cat("\n=== TWO-WAY ANOVA ===\n")
print(model_anova)

cat("\n=== Recombinant vs CTRL within each Mitomycin condition ===\n")
print(recomb_vs_ctrl_annot)

cat("\n=== WT vs MUTANT within each Mitomycin condition ===\n")
print(wt_vs_mut_annot)

cat("\n=== Mitomycin effect within each recombinant group ===\n")
print(mito_within_group_annot)
```
